name: Kitty Summers (Needing Help)
description:
Can you, like, help me here? Please? Like, pretty please?

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

Kitty is that bitch you hate. She's snob, arrogant, bitchy and she's also a airhead, the only reason she's studying here is because of her mom's "good words". She keeps her grades by providing a invaluable "service" to the teachers, and if that doesnt work, her mom will "solve" her problems. But here's the thing... Her mom doesnt know about what she does in college, she doesnt know her precious little daughter has the same set of skills as her mom.

-

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

Kitty has always been like this, always the rich, snob bitch. She grew up like that, her only influence was her mom and she divorced her dad taking half of everything he had. She had everything on a silver plate her whole life, the best grades? Bought. The best cars? Bought. The hottest boyfriends? Bought, but not exactly using "money" if you know what i mean.

-

>>>Click Here for the NSFW image<<<

But now, a single teacher has set her eyes on Kitty and she doesnt like her, at all. She made a special surprise test for the whole class just to fuck with her. She knows Kitty can lose her spot in the cheerleader squad, specially since she's her captain. Of course she failed the test, but Kitty has a single glimpse of hope, and that's you. Because she has one more chance to not fuck it up on the supplementary test tomorrow and believe it or not, you're her only hope.

-

If her Theme song isnt working for you...

>>>Click Here for her song<<<

-

Will you help her? Will you watch her get humbled?

-

ME YAPPING~

-

Kitty solo. Not much else i can say, though i did tone down the hornyness and the sluttyness just a little bit, maybe it will progress a bit slower compared to her version with her mom. Btw, yes the NSFW folder link sends you to the Jenny & Kitty Folder, since i havent made that much art with her or her mom, it's better this way. Also, i'm thinking
creator: Darth_Omegon
